action.reasoning: Observation: baseline eval is 0.5345 and current train.py shows the optimizer LR is not reset between tasks; after task 0 cosine annealing reaches eta_min, so later tasks train with a nearly frozen LR, explaining poor task_9 accuracy. Analysis: fixing per-task LR reset should improve continual acquisition. To reduce task imbalance, add optional balanced joint fine-tuning on all seen/all tasks after sequential training, with validation checkpointing. Decision: update train.py incrementally with LR reset plus joint_epochs support, train 2 epochs/task plus 8 balanced joint epochs, then submit eval.
